prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing
search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an
item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST
125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit.

=== PRODUCT CONTEXT ===
SKU: UPD-WIBBLY-SQUISHER-SPIDERMAN-HPN
Product Type: SQUEEZE_TOY
Brand (from catalog): Ball, Bounce and Sport Inc.
Existing Title: Ball, Bounce and Sport Inc. Spider-Man Blue Wibbly Squish Beads Ball - Lights Up Spiderman Squishy Stress Balls for Kids, Perfect Gift for Birthdays, Party Favor Bags and Carnivals - 3 Inch, 1 Ball
Description: This bouncy and squishy stress ball set makes a perfect party favor, contest prize, and classroom treat for students. Ideal for party goodie bags or any occasion that calls for a cool handout! Every kid will be thrilled to receive squishy kids toys when attending a birthday party or winning a carnival game. Office workers can use this sensory squish ball for stress release. Both children and adults will love playing with these mini stress balls. Ideal gift for novelty collectors and fans of Marvel superheroes. Playing with stress balls fidget toys helps exercise and stimulate small muscles in your hands, fingers, and wrists. Best for party game prizes, piñata drops, and goodie bags. Kids and adults will surely enjoy the mesh ball LED lights. Squeeze the stress away with these cool-looking Marvel Spiderman squishie stress balls. These amazing mesh fidget balls come with wibbly beads inside and feature a Spidey geometric logo image! A must-have kids stress ball that lights up as you squeeze it and shake it! Perfect gift for kids and adults who love to collect Spiderman toys for stress relief at home or work. These Spider-Man Wibbly Bead Squeeze Balls are made of super soft and stretchy rubber for hours of stress relieving fun! Sensory child-friendly material is that meant to last. The squishy stress relief balls are sure to provide hours of entertainment for both children and adults who enjoy playing with squishy balls fidget toys. Includes 8 Marvel Spider-Man Blue Wibbly Squish Bead Balls with LED light packaged individually. Each Spider-Man mesh squishy ball features full-color graphics of a cool geometric Spidey logo. The fidget ball squishy toys are filled with wibbly squishy beads that offer a cool textured sensation, and LED lights that activate when you squeeze or shake the stress ball fidget toy. The stress relief toys balls measure 3 inches.
Search Terms: marvel avengers spiderman spider man squishy play ball beads fidget party favors toys boys buddies stocking stuffer
Features:
(none)

=== ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) ===
Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title,
not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order:
  ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name}
- brand: use the catalog brand above.
- pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a
  dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent.
- size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS).
Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number.
Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters.
Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing

=== TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) ===
Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most
search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a
repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable").
Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the
highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point.
Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep
acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out
"&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And
International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are
allowed.
Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name.

=== RETURN ===
Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape:
{"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: Ball Bounce and Sport Inc. 3 Inch Blue Spiderman Squish Ball

openai.item_name: Ball, Bounce and Sport Inc. 8-pk 3 in Blue Spider-Man Squish Beads Ball

anthropic.title_differentiation: LED Lights, Wibbly Beads, Stress Relief Fidget Toy, Party Favors, Sensory Play, Soft Rubber, Marvel Licensed

openai.title_differentiation: LED Lights, Wibbly Beads Texture, Squeeze And Shake Activated, Party Favor Prizes, Stress Relief Fidget Toy
